mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(UNO,10,3)),0)+1 AS 'MAXNO' FROM USER WHERE SUBSTRING(UNO,2,8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER ( UNO, UNAME, UID, UPW, UBIRTH, UADDR, UGENDER, UPHONE, UMAIL, UPROFILE, UINSERTDATE, UUPDATEDATE, UDELETEYN, UROLE, UTEMPYN ) VALUES ( #{uno}, #{uname}, #{uid}, #{upw}, #{ubirth}, #{uaddr}, #{ugender}, #{uphone}, #{umail}, #{uprofile}, NOW(), NOW(), 'Y', #{urole}, #{utempyn} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UID) FROM USER WHERE UID = #{uid} AND UDELETEYN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE UMAIL = #{umail}

SELECT UNO, UNAME, UID, UBIRTH, UPHONE, UPROFILE, UINSERTDATE FROM USER WHERE UDELETEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY UINSERTDATE ASC, UNAME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE UDELETEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE USER SET UNAME = #{uname}, UBIRTH = #{ubirth}, UADDR = #{uaddr}, UGENDER = #{ugender}, UPHONE = #{uphone}, UMAIL = #{umail}, UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UNO = #{uno}
UPDATE USER SET UPROFILE = #{uprofile}, UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UNO = #{uno}
UPDATE USER SET UPW = #{upw}, UTEMPYN = #{utempyn}, UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UNO = #{uno}
